title: Yellow Jacket Removal in Larchmont, Westchester | $350-$550

intro: Yellow jackets pose a serious threat to Larchmont residents and their families, especially during late summer when colonies are at peak size. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert yellow jacket removal services throughout Larchmont and Westchester County, safely eliminating nests from homes, yards, and commercial properties. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to protect your property and ensure these aggressive wasps don't return.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Larchmont homeowners for years with fast, safe yellow jacket removal backed by our satisfaction guarantee. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of Westchester properties and use eco-conscious treatment methods that protect your family, pets, and the beautiful landscapes that make Larchmont special.
localContext: Larchmont's tree-lined streets, historic Tudor and Colonial homes, and proximity to Manor Park and the waterfront create ideal nesting conditions for yellow jackets in eaves, wall voids, and landscaped yards. The village's mature properties and established gardens near the Larchmont Shore Club and along Weaver Street often require professional intervention to safely remove aggressive yellow jacket colonies.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a yellow jacket nest in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Larchmont and Westchester County. Our technicians can typically eliminate a yellow jacket nest within 1-2 hours, though larger or hard-to-reach colonies may require additional time or follow-up visits to ensure complete removal.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 yellow jacket removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest elimination using professional-grade treatments, removal of accessible nests when safe to do so, and a follow-up guarantee. Pricing varies based on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests are typically less expensive than those in walls or high eaves.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets dangerous to my family and pets in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are highly aggressive, especially when their nest is threatened. Unlike bees, they can sting multiple times and often attack in swarms. This poses serious risks to children, pets, and anyone with allergies. Professional removal is the safest option to protect your household.

faqs.question: When is yellow jacket season in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket activity peaks from late July through October in Westchester County. Colonies grow largest in late summer, making them most aggressive during this time. Early fall is when you'll notice them around outdoor gatherings and trash areas as natural food sources decline.
